title: pelargonium × luxurians
intro: Pelargonium × luxurians, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose, is a hybrid plant species in the Geraniaceae family, known for its fragrant leaves and stems. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The health benefits of Pelargonium × luxurians include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea, essential oil, and tincture, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
